steps.title: Use periodicity of sine
steps.content:
Sine has period $2\pi$, so $\sin(\theta) = \sin(\theta - 2\pi k)$ for any integer $k$. Reduce $18\pi$:

$$18\pi = 9 \cdot 2\pi$$

So $\sin(18\pi) = \sin(0) = 0$.

steps.title: Match
steps.content: $\sin(18\pi) = 0$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
